auto_chip_throttling.description: Automatically adjusts chip frequencies based on temperatures

automatic_pause_on_boot.description: The miner automatically switches to pause mode after boot

downscale_preset_on_failure.description: Automatic preset reduction in case of miner overheating or board break error

max_startup_delay_time.description: Maximum delay time before mining startup

restore_miner_state_on_reboot.description: Automatically starts mining after a reboot or power outage, even if mining was previously paused

tuner_bad_chip_hr_threshold.description: Autotuning: hashrate threshold below which the chips are marked as bad ones

average_hashrate.description: Deprecated. Same as hr_average but measure is MG/s.

instant_hashrate.description: Deprecated. Same as hr_realtime but measure is MG/s.

AutotunePresetStatus.description: Preset status. `tuned` means that preset tuned successfully

chips.description:
An array of per chip `freq` settings values.
`0` (zero) value means that value used from `board` settings

freq.description:
Board `freq` settings values.
`0` (zero) value means that value used from `globals` settings

timezones.description:
Available timezones list.
A purpose for this field is to display timezones list in UI.
Makes sense for GET queries only and shall ignore for UPDATE queries.

oneOf.description: Globals passed here when preset is disabled

LogType.description: Log type name, `*` for all log types

description.description: Optional. Description if status is failure

miner_state_time.description:
Time spent in the current state.
For now implemented for `mining` state only.

top_preset.description: Profile name. Max profile that preset_switcher can switch

after.description:
Number of seconds after the system will reboot
By default, is 3 seconds

restart_required.description: Miner restart required to apply config

find_miner.description: Flag to switch locate_miner function on target devices. Optional, default `false`

unlocked.description: Show screen-lock status (checks that  any of auth methods satisfies)

200.description: Reset list of autotune profiles done successfully
Reset all autotune profiles done successfully
Warranty canceled successfully, or was not provided
Firmware was successfully removed. System will reboot after

post.summary: Remove firmware and boot from stock

200.description: Firmware update successfully. System will reboot after

parameters.description: Log type name. All logs `*` are not implemented for this route
parameters.name: log_type

parameters.description: Amount of seconds until now. Max is 3 days (3 * 24 * 60 * 60) Default is 1 day (24 * 60 * 60)
parameters.name: time_slice

parameters.description: Resample step in seconds to count average, default is 15 min (15 * 60)
parameters.name: step

200.description: Settings factory reset done successfully. System will reboot after
Firmware restored successfully. System will reboot after

403.description: Miner have warranty. Cancel warranty first
